Meet The Service Manager - Milton CAT
results.snippet: Ryan Robinson Hi, I’m Ryan Robinson, Milton CAT’s Scarborough , ME, service manager. Growing up in Maine, I spent a lot of time working on a potato farm and my family farm. I was in and around all sorts of heavy equipment. I developed a passion for equipment which I later was able to translate into my career at Milton CAT. I studied mechanical engineering at UMaine, Orono. While in college ...
